headline: 1 Mid-Cap Stock with Exciting Potential and 2 We Brush Off
summary: Mid-cap stocks have the best odds of scaling into $100 billion corporations thanks to their tested business models and large addressable markets. But the many opportunities in front of them attract significant competition, spanning from industry behemoths with seemingly infinite resources to small, nimble players with chips on their shoulders.

headline: Expand Energy Corp (NASDAQ:EXE) Shows Strong Decent Value Potential with Low Valuation and High Profitability
summary: Expand Energy Corp (EXE) offers strong value with an 8/10 valuation score, trading at a low P/E of 11.77. It combines solid profitability, healthy finances, and modest growth, making it a compelling "Decent Value" stock.

headline: Expand Energy (EXE) Downgraded at Barclays, Price Target Trimmed by $17
summary: Expand Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:EXE) is included among the 14 Best Oil and Gas Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. headline: Expand Energy Weighs New 20 Year LNG Deal Against Earnings Outlook
summary: Expand Energy (NasdaqGS:EXE) signed a 20-year LNG Sales and Purchase Agreement with Delfin FLNG Vessel 1, expanding its contracted liquefied natural gas volumes. The company also reported strong first quarter earnings, supported by solid production and favorable commodity pricing. These developments have arrived while the stock closed at $92.98 and has declined 15.3% year to date. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:EXE, the combination of a long-term LNG contract and strong first quarter...
